body_type_outfit_formulas_bank_v1.description: Body-type and height-aware styling guidance for men and women. Provides flexible goals, flattering silhouettes, and outfit formulas. No shaming, no absolutes.

tone_safety: Never criticize the body; focus on outfit goals and proportions.
Use optional language: 'you could', 'if you want', 'one easy move'.
If user is vulnerable, suppress body-type guidance unless they explicitly ask.
global_rules.default_pattern: 1 supportive line + 1 body-type-friendly formula + 1 invitation question

micro_moves: Keep hem lines clean and avoid heavy bunching at ankles.
Slightly higher waistlines can help elongate the line.
Monochrome or tonal dressing reads longer and cleaner.
Aim for one fitted + one relaxed piece for easy balance.
Keep one focal point and let the rest support.
Add intentional proportion breaks (belt, layer, or hem contrast).
Structured outer layers look especially premium.
Slightly wider silhouettes can look very elegant if kept clean.

layers: structured blazers ending at waist/upper hip
avoid_notes: too much bulk exactly at widest hip point (unless intentional and balanced)

safe: Structured/neckline-focused top + high-waist straight pants + sleek shoe
Wrap top + clean wide-leg trouser + minimal accessories
bold: Statement shoulder top + monochrome bottom + hero shoe/bag

accessory_moves: Bring focus upward with earrings/neckline detail.
Keep bags structured and mid-size for clean balance.

avoid_notes: boxy layers that hide all shape (unless the goal is oversized)

safe: Fitted top + high-waist straight trousers + loafer
Knit top + midi skirt + clean sandal/boot
bold: Monochrome fitted base + statement outer layer + sleek shoe

accessory_moves: Belts work well if you want definition.
Keep one hero piece max to avoid over-styling.

layers: longer open layers that create vertical lines
avoid_notes: heavy shoulder embellishments if you want a softer look

safe: Clean v-neck top + wide-leg trousers + minimal shoe
Simple tee + A-line skirt + structured bag
bold: Minimal top + printed/bold bottom + quiet accessories

accessory_moves: Use bags/shoes to anchor the lower half.
Keep neck area clean if earrings are bold.

avoid_notes: high cling fabrics around midsection if it feels uncomfortable

safe: Open neckline top + straight pants + structured outer layer
Tunic + slim-straight jeans + clean sneaker/loafer
bold: Monochrome base + statement jacket/coat + hero bag

accessory_moves: Longer pendant or open neckline creates an easy vertical line.
Structured bag adds polish and shape.

avoid_notes: all-one-boxy silhouette if you want more shape (unless oversized is the goal)

safe: Cropped jacket + high-waist trousers + sleek shoe
Shirt half-tuck + straight pants + structured bag
bold: Layered look (vest/blazer) + tonal base + statement accessory

accessory_moves: Belts or structured layers create shape quickly.
A hero bag/shoe gives focal point.

avoid_notes: thin cling tees if they feel unflattering

safe: Heavier tee + overshirt + straight trousers + clean sneaker
Open collar shirt + straight chinos + loafer
bold: Monochrome base + structured jacket + premium shoe

accessory_moves: Clean watch + tidy collar reads premium instantly.

avoid_notes: too-skinny pants if they exaggerate bottom heaviness

safe: Crewneck knit + straight jeans + clean sneaker
Overshirt + tee + straight chinos + loafer
bold: Statement jacket + simple base + minimal accessory

accessory_moves: Keep shoes clean and low-profile to maintain balance.

style_goals: avoid making shoulders look too huge (if undesired)

avoid_notes: super skinny pants that exaggerate shoulder width

safe: Clean tee + straight trousers + minimalist sneaker
Open collar shirt + relaxed trousers + loafer
bold: Texture hero (knit/overshirt) + relaxed trousers + premium shoe

accessory_moves: One hero shoe or watch is enough.

avoid_notes: extreme oversized + extreme skinny at once

safe: Polo + tailored trousers + loafer
Shirt + chinos + clean sneaker
bold: Monochrome look + statement jacket + leather shoe

accessory_moves: Match belt and shoe tone for instant polish.

avoid_notes: flat, unlayered fits if you want more dimension

safe: Tee + overshirt + straight jeans + sneaker
Knit + chinos + loafer
bold: Textured layer (tweed/knit) + tonal base + premium shoe

usage_rules.default_usage: Use only when body_type is known OR user explicitly asks 'what suits me'.
usage_rules.when_unknown_body_type: Ask once: 'Want this personalized by fit goals/body type, or keep it general?'
usage_rules.options_mode: If user asks for options, output 2 safe + 1 bold body-type-aware formulas.
usage_rules.tone_integration: Reaction → Body-type friendly guidance (1) → Optional height overlay (1) → Invitation question.
